title: elymus troctolepis
intro: Elymus troctolepis, also known as Trodden Wheat Grass or Tsuruhashi Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Elymus troctolepis include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory diseases, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent cardiovascular diseases. Elymus troctolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
